bolloom_crop.title: Harvest a full Bolloom crop from your Poise Forest farm — Bolloom Fruit for End food system integration

booflo_fur_uses.title: Use Booflo Fur in at least 2 End-tier crafting recipes — check JEI for endergetic: crafting uses

subtitle.text: Booflo Fur and Bolloom Fruit are not decoration drops. They have crafting uses. Check JEI and use them.

description: CH.14 · ENDERGETIC MATERIALS
▸ Endergetic Expansion adds a passive resource biome
to the End dimension.
The Poise Forest drops Booflo Fur, Puff Bug Wings, Bolloom Fruit.
All three have crafting uses beyond being curiosities.
Ch14 is the point where you cash in what you farmed in Ch13.
◈ BOOFLO FUR USES
└ Booflo Vest: 6× End jump height (crafted in Ch13)
If not already built: build now
└ Additional crafting: check JEI for endergetic: recipes
Booflo Fur appears in End-tier armor, tools, or bed equivalents
└ Soft material: high crafting value in comfort/sleep items
(Comforts mod: compatible beds may use End materials)
└ Trade value: MCA Reborn villagers may have trades
for unique End materials post-homecoming
◈ BOLLOOM FRUIT USES
└ Food: Bolloom Fruit is a direct food item
Low hunger value but useful for Diet balance (fruit group)
└ Crafting: Bolloom Fruit appears in Endergetic food recipes
(check JEI: endergetic: food recipes)
└ Farm integration: Bolloom Buds on End Stone → passive harvest
No bonemeal needed — grows on own schedule
└ Pair with End kitchen (Void Kitchen quest): Bolloom dish
completes the 5-source End feast
◈ PUFF BUG WINGS
└ Puff Bug Wings: secondary material from Puff Bug kills
Small creature — found same biome as Booflo
└ Crafting uses: check JEI for endergetic: recipes
May appear in decorative or mobility items
└ Drop rate: Puff Bug is uncommon — farm via targeted biome hunting
(search Poise Forest thoroughly, they are small and easy to miss)
▸ The Poise Forest predates the civilizations.
The Booflo grazed before anyone was there to observe it.
The Bolloom grew before anyone planted it.
The Puff Bug flew before anyone named it.
You showed up, named everything, started farming everything.
That is the colonist instinct.
The biome does not notice.
▶ Harvest a full Bolloom crop from your farm [check]
▶ Use Booflo Fur in 2+ crafting recipes [check]
◇ Endergetic materials cycle into the End food system via
Ender's Delight cross-recipes.
Check JEI for: endersdelight: recipes that call for endergetic: inputs.
The two mods are designed to interact.
